evidence: The gecko is positioned vertically on an object with the hindquarters/tail hanging down.
A dark dropping-like object is visible below the gecko in later frames.
Although there is mouth/tongue movement in the clip, the event sequence includes a clearer defecation cue than drinking.
why_segmentvlm_helped: The time-sampled event sheet shows both the misleading mouth action and the later dropping cue, allowing a higher-priority defecation interpretation.
